effects are that of Mercury, Mars, and Dragon Head and that of
Mars, Jupiter and Dragon Head. This kind of effect operates on
the mental faculties of the affected natives more vigourously under
certain specific conditions and situations. So, persons subjected to
such sort of problems should not be left alone in darkness and in
water bound areas. Natives suffering from such hallucinations
should not visit a spot of accident, because the life cells have
reversible reactions, imposing great pressure on the minds.
DELINEATION: Dragon Head is head, Jupiter indicates
life, and mars is power/Shakthi.
In between Jupiter (the life) and Dragon Head (the Demon
mind) posited in an irksome position is the Mars. (Power/Energy/
Shakthi). Mars is inimical to Dragon Head, and the mind (Moon).
When Moon is locked between Mars and Dragon Head,
there will be mental aberration, over flowing emotions,
hallucinations etc. An astrologer can trace out these causes and
offer a solution for it.
